title: smilax orbiculata
intro: Smilax orbiculata, also known as the circular-leafed smilax or Chinese smilax, is a type of climbing vine native to East Asia, characterized by its heart-shaped leaves and small, white flowers. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries, valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Smilax orbiculata include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and possessing antimicrobial and antifungal properties. Smilax orbiculata is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, as well as being used in traditional Chinese medicine formulas to promote overall well-being.
